sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى نَوْمٍ كَافٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ جِدًّا لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je veoma važno za mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is very necessary for mental health.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِالنَّوْمِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju spavanje u trajanju od osam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend sleeping for eight hours every night.

sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْعَمِيقُ يُسَاعِدُ الدِّمَاغَ عَلَى الرَّاحَةِ وَيُحَسِّنُ الذَّاكِرَةَ.
sentences.translation: Dubok san pomaže mozgu da se odmori i poboljšava pamćenje.
sentences.translationEn: Deep sleep helps the brain rest and improves memory.
